programme.desc: S1 E2074 Anupamaa sacrifices her personal ambitions to dedicate her life to her family. However, she eventually decides to live on her own terms after failing to receive credit for her many trials.
programme.title: Anupamaa

programme.desc: S2 E346 Tulsi and Mihir Virani navigate the ensuing challenges that emerge in their family which has endured a lengthy passage of time.
programme.title: Kyunki Saas Bhi Kabhi Bahu Thi

programme.desc: S1 E5218 Dr Abhimanyu, a misogamist, finds himself getting attracted to Akshara, Kartik and Naira's daughter. Things take a tricky turn when Akshara's half-sister, Arohi, falls in love with him.
programme.title: Yeh Rishta Kya Kehlata Hai

programme.desc: S1 E32 Arnav and Khushi are complete opposites but fall in love eventually despite all their differences and their many misunderstandings.
programme.title: Iss Pyaar Ko Kya Naam Doon

programme.desc: S1 E4 Brij faces questions from Channi's mother about her son's death. At the Lohri festivities, Rupinder and Rano become anxious upon realising Dev is not present.
programme.title: Geet-Hui Sabse Parayi

programme.desc: S1 E73 Ahem's antipathy breaks Gopi's heart; Hetal hopes Baa can talk some sense into Kokila.
programme.title: Saath Nibhaana Saathiya

programme.title: Saath Nibhaana Saathiya

programme.desc: S1 E156 Shivprasad lives a quiet life as a devoted husband and father, but he harbors a massive secret. Unknown to his family, he is also Parshuram, a highly skilled spy on dangerous missions.
programme.title: Mr & Mrs Parshuram

programme.desc: S1 E39 Single mother Dr. Noyonika helps pop star sensation Ishaan regain his voice, to the delight of her daughter. But tensions rise as they fall for each other.
programme.title: Sairaab

programme.desc: S1 E81 A reserved businessman who avoids romance crosses paths with an artist haunted by a bitter past, leaving the prospect of a budding romance hanging in the balance.
programme.title: Oh Humnava Tum Dena Saath Mera
